items.title: Agglomerative merge steps
items.mermaid:
flowchart BT
  p1["point A"] --- c12["cluster AB"]
  p2["point B"] --- c12
  p3["point C"] --- c123["cluster ABC"]
  c12 --- c123
  p4["point D"] --- c1234["all points"]
  c123 --- c1234
items.caption: Bottom-up agglomeration: singletons merge into larger clusters until one root cluster remains.

items.title: Dendrogram cut for k clusters
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  root["root cluster"] --> leftBranch["subtree L"]
  root --> rightBranch["subtree R"]
  leftBranch --> leafA["A"]
  leftBranch --> leafB["B"]
  rightBranch --> leafC["C"]
  rightBranch --> leafD["D"]
  cutLine["horizontal cut at height h"]
items.caption: A horizontal cut through the dendrogram at height h separates the tree into k disjoint clusters without re-running the algorithm.
